case_title: DIAZ KAREN VS NESTEL LAWRENCE A

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIAZ KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
POS ON LAWRENCE A. NESTEL SUB-SERVED.NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF DIAZ KAREN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-1991, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,300.00, DEFT WILL PAY $2000 ON 10/28/91, AND $1300 ON 11/26/91 FINAL SETTLEMENT OF ALL CLAIMS EACH SIDE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $715.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A
EX-PARTE STAYING EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DE F./ALSO DECLARATION OF MILTON KATZ IN SUPPORT OF EX-PARTE ORDER STAYING EXEC.OFJDGMNT 2/15 9AM D-6.
JUDGM. DEBTOR'S SAT. OF JUDGMENT FILED AND SENT TO DEPT. 6 (DECLARATION TYPE).
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NESTEL LAWRENCE A AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
POS UNTIMELY, NOT SERVED 15 DAYS PRIOR HEARING ON SUBSERVICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGM. DEBTOR'S SAT. OF JUDGMENT GRANTED. DEFEND'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NESTEL LAWRENCE A
